title: Looking for Expert Feedback on a Dueling DDQN Stock Trading System (DRL)
author: Comfortable-Sky-2711
selftext:
Looking for someone with experience in deep reinforcement learning.

I built a Dueling DDQN model for stock trading, using differential Sharpe and Sortino ratios as the reward function. The project includes a custom event-driven backtesting engine and XAI explainability tools. I’ve implemented standard techniques to avoid look-ahead bias and backtesting overfitting.

At this point, I’m stuck on what meaningful improvements or research directions to pursue beyond the features already outlined in the README. Furthermore, I also don't have enough resources to train the model. Just bought I9, RTX 5060 with 32gb RAM, but have yet to set up. The project was primarily built as a way to learn and implement the full ML workflow, from data handling to evaluation.

  
Repo Link: [shh1v/ReinforceTrader: A DRL model (Duelling DDQN) for stock trading, featuring a custom Event-Driven Backtester and Explainability tools.](https://github.com/shh1v/ReinforceTrader/)
